lineup_source: South Korea starting XI vs Czechia, 2026 World Cup group match (4-2-3-1 under Hong Myung-bo)

players.name: Kim Seung-gyu
players.note: Born in Ulsan; father Kim Gwang-u supported his career, mother's details kept private, both Korean.

players.name: Seol Young-woo
players.note: Born in Ulsan; no foreign heritage documented, standard Korean background.

players.name: Kim Min-jae
players.note: Born in Tongyeong to father Kim Tae-gyun (ex-judoka) and mother Lee Yoo-sun (ex-track athlete), both Korean.

players.name: Cho Yu-min
players.note: Born in Daegu; no foreign heritage documented, standard Korean background.

players.name: Lee Tae-seok
players.note: Son of former Korea national team player Lee Eul-yong; both parents Korean.

players.name: Paik Seung-ho
players.note: Born in Seoul to father Paik Il-yeong, an athletics professor, and mother Kim Mi-hee, both Korean.

players.name: Hwang In-beom
players.note: Born in Daejeon; father Hwang Seo-yeon documented as supportive, mother undisclosed, both Korean.

players.name: Son Heung-min
players.note: Born in Chuncheon to father Son Woong-jung, a former pro footballer, and mother Eun Ja-sook, both Korean.

players.name: Lee Jae-sung
players.note: Born in Ulsan; mother named as Choi Soo-yeol, both parents Korean.

players.name: Lee Kang-in
players.note: Born in Incheon to father Lee Un-seong, a taekwondo instructor from Chungcheongnam-do, and mother Kang Seong-mi from Jeollanam-do.

players.name: Oh Hyeon-gyu
players.note: Born in Namyangju; father Oh Hae-seon ran a restaurant to support his career, both parents Korean.
